headline: American Express (AXP) Stock After 5-Year 118% Gain Is There Still Upside Potential
summary: If you are wondering whether American Express stock still offers value after a strong run in recent years, the starting point is to understand what the current price is really reflecting. At a last close of US$340.54, the stock has returned 8.7% over the past week, 9.1% over the past month, declined 8.6% year to date, and is sitting on 16.1% over 1 year, 110.1% over 3 years and 117.9% over 5 years. Recent price moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing investor interest in large payment and...

headline: US FINANCIAL 15 SPLIT CORP. Preferred Dividend Declared
summary: TORONTO, June 18, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- US Financial 15 Split Corp ("US Financial 15") declares its monthly distribution of $0.07317 for each Preferred share, or 10.00% annually based on the previous month end net asset value. Distributions are payable July 10, 2026 to shareholders on record as at June 30, 2026. US Financial 15 invests in a portfolio primarily consisting of 15 U.S. financial services companies as follows: American Express, Bank of America, Bank of New York Mellon Corp., Citig

headline: What Makes American Express Company (AXP) an Attractive Bet?
summary: Giverny Capital Asset Management, LLC, an investment management company, recently published its first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy can be downloaded here. The model portfolio fell 6.88% this quarter, compared to the S&P 500’s 4.33% decline. Over the past year, the portfolio gained 8.52%, while the index increased by 17.80%. Geopolitical conflicts and inflation concerns drove […]
